html:
Exclusive to:

The Tar Extractor is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab and requires 2 Coconuts, 4 Bamboo and 4 Limestones to craft. Tar Extractors can only be placed on top of Tar Slicks. They will extract Tar and drop it at the output end every 2 min (4 per Day). When fully fueled, a Tar Extractor will last for two days, producing a total of 8 Tar. They can be refueled self-sufficiently by using some of the extracted Tar.

Tips

  • As Tar Slicks can only be found in Medium and Deep Ocean, the player will be exposed to Waves when interacting with a Tar Extractor. Sea Walls can be built for protection.
  • Alternatively, the player can create Tar Slicks with the Quacken Drill, providing easier access to Tar.

Trivia

  • The Tar Extractor was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

Gallery

  • A Tar Extractor producing Tar.
  • Tar Extractor as seen in the poster for the Home Sea Home update.
  • Tar Extractor animation.

The Tar Extractor is a craftable Structure introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is found in the Nautical Tab and requires 2 Coconuts, 4 Bamboo and 4 Limestones to craft. Tar Extractors can only be placed on top of Tar Slicks. They will extract Tar and drop it at the output end every 2 min (4 per Day). When fully fueled, a Tar Extractor will last for two days, producing a total of 8 Tar. They can be refueled self-sufficiently by using some of the extracted Tar.
Tips[edit | edit source]
As Tar Slicks can only be found in Medium and Deep Ocean, the player will be exposed to Waves when interacting with a Tar Extractor. Sea Walls can be built for protection.
Alternatively, the player can create Tar Slicks with the Quacken Drill, providing easier access to Tar.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Tar Extractor was added to the Shipwrecked DLC more than a year after its official completion in the Home Sea Home update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Máy Hút Nhựa Đường là một Công Trình chế tạo được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Hàng Hải và cần 2 Dừa, 4 Tre và 4 Đá Vôi để chế tạo. Máy chiết hắc ín chỉ có thể được đặt phía trên các vết hắc ín. Họ sẽ trích xuất Tar và thả nó ở đầu ra cứ sau 2 phút (4 mỗi ngày). Khi được nạp đầy nhiên liệu, Máy chiết hắc ín sẽ hoạt động trong hai ngày, tạo ra tổng cộng 8 hắc ín. Chúng có thể được tiếp nhiên liệu một cách tự động bằng cách sử dụng một ít nhựa đường được chiết xuất.

The '''Tar Extractor''' is a craftable [[Structure]] introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Nautical Tab]] and requires 2 [[Coconut]]s, 4 [[Bamboo]] and 4 [[Limestone]]s to craft. Tar Extractors can only be placed on top of [[Tar Slick]]s. They will extract [[Tar]] and drop it at the output end every 2 min (4 per [[Day]]). When fully fueled, a Tar Extractor will last for two days, producing a total of 8 Tar. They can be refueled self-sufficiently by using some of the extracted Tar.

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* As Tar Slicks can only be found in [[Ocean#Shipwrecked|Medium]] and [[Ocean#Shipwrecked|Deep Ocean]], the player will be exposed to [[Wave]]s when interacting with a Tar Extractor. [[Sea Wall]]s can be built for protection.
* Alternatively, the player can create Tar Slicks with the [[Quacken Drill]], providing easier access to Tar.

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* The Tar Extractor was added to the ''Shipwrecked'' DLC more than a year after its official completion in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#November 21st, 2017 - Home Sea Home Update|Home Sea Home]]'' update, after being tested in a beta branch for several months.
